flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Arkansas-Pulaski Technical College rose 37% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.9k → $9.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Arkansas-Pulaski Technical College fell 17% between 2007 and 2010 (13.3% → 11.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Arkansas-Pulaski Technical College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.7k → $6.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Arkansas-Pulaski Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).
